name: TestWaitForLinBitStreamStatus
title: TestWaitForLinBitStreamStatus
syntax: long TestWaitForLinBitStreamStatus(dword awaitedStatus, dword timeout); // form 1
long TestWaitForLinBitStreamStatus(dword channel, dword awaitedStatus, dword timeout); // form 2
description: Waits until the sending of a LIN bit stream is started or stopped. The function will resume immediately if the transmission already has the awaited status.
Should the event not occur before the expiration of the time timeout, the wait condition is resolved nevertheless.

parameters.name: awaitedStatus
parameters.description: 0: Sending of the bit stream is stopped. 1: Sending of the bit stream is started.

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: The LIN channel number which will be queried.

parameters.name: timeout
parameters.description: Maximum time that should be waited [ms]. (Transmission of 0: no timeout controlling).

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
